scripts.build:ios: yarn sync:ios && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -archivePath ./build/App.xcarchive archive CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.build:android: yarn sync:android && cd android/ && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp ./app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../build/
